languages.text: {n}Космодесантник недоверчиво кривит губы.{/n} "Если я его не победил, тебе не стоит и пытаться. Но если уж ты угодишь с ним в схватку..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Космодесантник недоверчиво кривит губы.{/n} "Если я его не победил, тебе не стоит и пытаться. Но если уж ты угодишь с ним в схватку..."

languages.text: {n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."
languages.original_text: {n}Космодесантник недоверчиво кривит губы.{/n} "Если я его не победил, тебе не стоит и пытаться. Но если уж ты угодишь с ним в схватку..."

{n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."
{n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."

languages.text: {n}阿斯塔特迟疑地皱起眉头。{/n}“若连我都无法战胜他，那你最好连试都不要试。但万一你真的和他交上手……”
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿斯塔特迟疑地皱起眉头。{/n}“若连我都无法战胜他，那你最好连试都不要试。但万一你真的和他交上手……”

languages.text: {n}El Astartes frunce el ceño, dubitativo.{/n} «Si yo no he podido derrotarlo, no deberías ni intentarlo. Pero si acabas luchando contra él...».
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Astartes frunce el ceño, dubitativo.{/n} «Si yo no he podido derrotarlo, no deberías ni intentarlo. Pero si acabas luchando contra él...».

languages.text: {n}Le guerrier de l'Astartes affiche une expression perplexe.{/n} « Si je ne suis pas parvenu à le vaincre, alors vous ne devriez même pas essayer. Mais si vous deviez vous retrouver face à lui... »
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le guerrier de l'Astartes affiche une expression perplexe.{/n} « Si je ne suis pas parvenu à le vaincre, alors vous ne devriez même pas essayer. Mais si vous deviez vous retrouver face à lui... »

languages.text: {n}Astartes, şüpheyle kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Ben onu yenemediysem senin buna kalkışmaman bile gerekir. Fakat yine de kendini onunla savaşırken bulursan..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Astartes, şüpheyle kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Ben onu yenemediysem senin buna kalkışmaman bile gerekir. Fakat yine de kendini onunla savaşırken bulursan..."

languages.text: {n}Der Astartes runzelt zweifelnd die Stirn.{/n} "Wenn ich ihn nicht besiegen konnte, solltet Ihr es gar nicht erst versuchen. Aber falls Ihr mit ihm kämpfen solltet ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Astartes frowns doubtfully.{/n} "If I have not defeated him, you should not even attempt it. But if you do find yourself in combat with him..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Astartes runzelt zweifelnd die Stirn.{/n} "Wenn ich ihn nicht besiegen konnte, solltet Ihr es gar nicht erst versuchen. Aber falls Ihr mit ihm kämpfen solltet ..."

languages.text: {n}アスタレスがためらいながら眉をひそめた。{/n}「もし私が彼を倒せなかったなら、君も挑戦するべきではない。しかし、もし君が彼と戦うことになったなら…」
